description: This image displays two company logos side-by-side on a white background. On the left is the NORCE logo, featuring the word "NORCE" in dark purple capital letters. The 'O' is replaced by a stylized circle with a spiky, star-like outline, also in dark purple. On the right is the GAFAG logo, with "GAFAG" in dark grey capital letters. Below the "AG" portion of GAFAG, there is a red horizontal line with short vertical dashes, and below that, in smaller grey text, the tagline "an e-GEOS (ASI / Telespazio) Company".
